name: idle_clicker
description_pt: Template de jogo idle/clicker. Jogador clica para ganhar recursos, compra upgrades, desbloqueia automacao. Progressao infinita com numeros crescentes.
description_en: Idle/clicker game template. Player clicks to earn resources, buys upgrades, unlocks automation. Infinite progression with growing numbers.
core_loop: Clicar → Ganhar recurso → Comprar upgrade → Automatizar → Prestigio → Repetir

scene_structure.game: Area de clique + Loja de upgrades + Barras de progresso + HUD de recursos
scene_structure.prestige: Tela de prestigio com bonus permanentes
